message:
style(tests): revert assert!(false, ...) back to panic!() in test assertions

The assert!(false, ...) + return pattern was unnecessarily verbose for
tests that should abort on failure. Simplify back to direct panic!()
calls in match arms where an unexpected variant should hard-fail:

tests/e2e_tui.rs:
- 2 JSONL parsing error paths: assert!(false) + return -> panic!()
- Doc comment: backtick-wrap tool_use in docstring

tests/provider_factory.rs:
- 4 match arms for azure and unknown provider rejection tests:
  assert!(false) + return blocks -> direct panic!() expressions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
